response.justification: The candidate's experience is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems with little to no recent or substantial C++ development on Windows platforms. While they have some C++ background from earlier roles, their current and recent work focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript, and Dlang, with no mention of SQL Server/Oracle or capital markets domain expertise. Domain requirements for fixed income or investment banking are not met.
strengths: Strong software development fundamentals with diverse language experience
Proven ability to work in agile/engineering-focused environments (TDD, CI/CD, etc.)
Experience with real-time systems and performance optimization
concerns: Lacks required 5+ years of recent C++ development on Windows platform
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server/Oracle or capital markets domain
No mention of Summit platform or messaging frameworks (Kafka, MQ)
